name: Pudding Crepes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Thawed Birds Eye Cool Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pudding mix with milk according to package instructions for pudding, beating only one minute.
2. Add whipped topping and beat an additional one minute, just until blended.
3. For each dessert, place approximately two tablespoons of strawberries in the center of one crepe.
4. Add one-third cup of filling and fold.
5. Top with remaining berries and additional whipped topping, if desired.
6. Makes six servings.
